# Site Profile Fixtures

This folder stores HTML + expected JSON fixtures for website profile parsing tests.

Structure:

- `<site-id>/group-basic.html`
- `<site-id>/group-with-images.html` (optional)
- `<site-id>/group-selected-state.html` (optional)
- `<site-id>/group-disabled-state.html` (optional)
- `<site-id>/expected.json`

Use `_template/` as a starter when onboarding a new site profile.
